# LusFam Energy Trading — llms.txt

LusFam Energy Trading (Private) Limited is an international petroleum transaction facilitation company incorporated in Zimbabwe on 21 April 2026. The company facilitates crude oil and refined product trades across Africa, the Middle East, Asia, Europe, and Latin America & Caribbean.

## What we do
We act as a transaction facilitator connecting buyers and sellers of petroleum products in international markets. Services include crude oil and refined product facilitation, supply chain coordination, buyer-seller matching, compliance guidance, and transaction advisory.

## Products facilitated
- EN 590 10ppm diesel
- Jet A-1 aviation fuel
- D2 gas oil
- Bonny Light crude oil
- Arab Light crude oil
- REBCO (Russian Export Blend Crude Oil)

## Trading standards
- INCOTERMS 2020 (FOB TTT / FOB TTV)
- ASTM D1655
- EN 590 specification

## Leadership
- Absalom Lusuwi — Founder & Managing Director
- Agnes Fungai Lusuwi — Executive Director, Administration & Strategic Partnerships

## Business identity
- Legal name: LusFam Energy Trading (Private) Limited
- Website: https://lusfamenergy.com
- Country of incorporation: Zimbabwe
- Industry: Petroleum trading and transaction facilitation
- Markets served: Africa, Middle East, Asia, Europe, Latin America & Caribbean
